---
title: "Pre2Clin Neuro"
logo: stride_lab_logo_transparent.png
server: shiny
favicon: favicon.ico
format: 
  dashboard:
    scrolling: true 
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/Ineichen-Group/NeuroTrialomics-Dashboard
---

```{python}
#| context: setup
import math
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from shiny import render, reactive, ui
from shinywidgets import render_widget  
import re
import ast
import plotly.express as px
```

```{python}
#| title: Filter Options
#| expandable: false

# Load data
path_linked = "../06_preclin_clinic_join/data/joined_data/condition_clinical_and_preclinical_13166.csv"
path_clin_metadata = "../06_preclin_clinic_join/data/joined_data/clinical_metadata_mapped.csv"
path_preclin_metadata = "../06_preclin_clinic_join/data/joined_data/preclinical_metadata_mapped_annotated.csv"

mapped_studies = pd.read_csv(path_linked)
df_clinical_metadata = pd.read_csv(path_clin_metadata)
df_preclinical_metadata = pd.read_csv(path_preclin_metadata)

mapped_studies['clinical_doc_ids'] = mapped_studies['clinical_doc_ids'].apply(ast.literal_eval)
mapped_studies['preclinical_doc_ids'] = mapped_studies['preclinical_doc_ids'].apply(ast.literal_eval)

# Initial sets
all_diseases = sorted(mapped_studies['disease'].dropna().unique().tolist())
all_drugs = sorted(mapped_studies['drug'].dropna().unique().tolist())

disease_options = ['Show All (C)'] + all_diseases
drug_options = ['Show All (P)'] + all_drugs

```

```{python}
def category_bar_chart(df, category_col, title, top_n=30):
    counts = df[category_col].value_counts().nlargest(top_n).reset_index()
    counts.columns = [category_col, "Document Count"]
    counts[category_col] = pd.Categorical(counts[category_col], categories=counts[category_col], ordered=True)

    fig = px.bar(
        counts,
        x="Document Count",
        y=category_col,
        orientation="h",
        text="Document Count",
        title=title,
        template="plotly_white",
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe
    )

    fig.update_layout(
        xaxis_title="Document Count",
        yaxis_title=category_col.replace("_", " ").title(),
        height=600,
        yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed")
    )
    fig.update_traces(textposition="outside", textfont_size=11)
    return fig

```

## {.sidebar}
```{python}
ui.input_select("disease_name", "Select Disease", choices=disease_options, selected='Show All (Dis)')
ui.input_select("drug_name", "Select Drug", choices=drug_options, selected='Show All (Drug)')

```

```{python}
@reactive.calc
def filtered_documents():
    disease = input.disease_name()
    drug = input.drug_name()

    filtered_df = mapped_studies
    if disease != 'Show All (C)':
        disease_pattern = re.escape(disease)
        filtered_df = filtered_df[
            filtered_df["disease"].str.contains(disease_pattern, case=False, na=False, flags=re.IGNORECASE)
        ]

    if drug != 'Show All (P)':
        filtered_df = filtered_df[
            filtered_df["drug"].str.lower() == drug.lower()
        ]

    # Flatten all clinical_doc_ids (NCTIDs) into a set
    all_nctids = set(nctid for sublist in filtered_df['clinical_doc_ids'] for nctid in sublist)
    # Flatten all preclinical_doc_ids (PMIDs) into a set
    all_pmids = set(pmid for sublist in filtered_df['preclinical_doc_ids'] for pmid in sublist)

    # GET CLINICAL VIEW
    df_clinical_metadata_filt = df_clinical_metadata[df_clinical_metadata['nct_id'].isin(all_nctids)]

    # GET PRECLINICAL VIEW
    df_preclinical_metadata_filt = df_preclinical_metadata[df_preclinical_metadata['PMID'].isin(all_pmids)]

    return filtered_df, df_clinical_metadata_filt, df_preclinical_metadata_filt
```

# Mapped Studies

## Row {height=120px}

```{python}
#| id: articles-box
@render.plot
def clinical_text():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    num_articles = len(set(clinical_df['nct_id']))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(3, 1))
    ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"{num_articles} Clinical", fontsize=16, ha='center', va='center')
    ax.axis('off')
    return fig
```

```{python}
#| id: pathways-box
@render.plot
def preclinical_text():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    num_articles = len(set(preclinical_df['PMID']))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(3, 1))
    ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"{num_articles} Preclinical", fontsize=16, ha='center', va='center')
    ax.axis('off')
    return fig
```

```{python}
#| id: pathways-box
@render.plot
def diseases_text():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    num_articles = len(set(filtered_df['disease']))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(3, 1))
    ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"{num_articles} Diseases", fontsize=16, ha='center', va='center')
    ax.axis('off')
    return fig
```

```{python}
#| id: pathways-box
@render.plot
def drugs_text():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    num_articles = len(set(filtered_df['drug']))
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(3, 1))
    ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"{num_articles} Drugs", fontsize=16, ha='center', va='center')
    ax.axis('off')
    return fig
```

## Row {height=40%}

### Column {.tabset}

```{python}
#| title: Filtered data

@render.data_frame
def datagrid():
    filtered_df, _, _ = filtered_documents()
    df_to_show = filtered_df[['disease', 'drug', 'clinical_count','preclinical_count','max_phase']]

    return render.DataGrid(
        df_to_show,
        width="100%",
        filters=True,
    )
```

## Row

### Column
```{python}
@render_widget
def drug_bar_chart():
    filtered_df, _, _ = filtered_documents()

    # Group and summarize
    drug_counts = filtered_df.groupby("drug")[["preclinical_count", "clinical_count"]].sum()
    drug_counts["total_count"] = drug_counts["preclinical_count"] + drug_counts["clinical_count"]
    drug_counts = drug_counts.sort_values("total_count", ascending=False).head(30)
    drug_counts = drug_counts.reset_index()

    # Melt for grouped bar
    melted = drug_counts.melt(
        id_vars="drug", 
        value_vars=["preclinical_count", "clinical_count"],
        var_name="Study Type", 
        value_name="Count"
    )

    # Ensure the y-axis (drug) is ordered by total count (most frequent on top)
    melted["drug"] = pd.Categorical(
        melted["drug"],
        categories=drug_counts["drug"],
        ordered=True
    )

    fig = px.bar(
        melted,
        x="Count",
        y="drug",
        color="Study Type",
        orientation="h",
        text="Count",
        title="Top 30 Drugs: Preclinical vs Clinical Study Counts",
        template="plotly_white",
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe
    )

    fig.update_layout(
        yaxis_title="Drug",
        xaxis_title="Study Count",
        height=800,
        barmode="group",
        legend_title="Study Type",
        yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed")  # 🔁 Most frequent on top
    )

    fig.update_traces(textposition="outside", textfont_size=11)

    return fig
```
### Column

```{python}
@render_widget
def study_over_time_chart():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    # Count studies by year
    preclinical_by_year = preclinical_df["year"].value_counts().sort_index().astype(int)
    clinical_by_year = clinical_df["start_year"].value_counts().sort_index().astype(int)

    # Combine and align years
    study_counts = pd.DataFrame({
        "Preclinical": preclinical_by_year,
        "Clinical": clinical_by_year
    }).fillna(0).astype(int).sort_index()
    study_counts.index = study_counts.index.astype(int)

    # Reset index for Plotly
    study_counts = study_counts.reset_index().rename(columns={"index": "Year"})

    fig = px.bar(
        study_counts,
        x="Year",
        y=["Preclinical", "Clinical"],
        barmode="group",
        text_auto=True,
        title="Number of Preclinical vs Clinical Studies Over Time",
        template="plotly_white",
        labels={"value": "Number of Studies", "variable": "Study Type"},
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe
    )

    fig.update_layout(
        xaxis_title="Year",
        yaxis_title="Study Count",
        legend_title="Study Type",
        height=600
    )

    return fig
```

# Preclinical

```{python}
#| title: Preclinical
@render.data_frame
def datagrid_preclinical():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    to_show = preclinical_df[['PMID','title','journal_name','year','publication_type','linkbert_mapped_conditions','disease','linkbert_mapped_drugs','drug','animal_species', 'animal_sex', 'animal_strain', 'animal_number']]
    return render.DataGrid(
        to_show,
        width="100%",
        filters=True,
    )
```

## Row

### Column
```{python}
#| title: Animal Number
@render_widget

def plot_animal_number():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "animal_number", "Document Count by Animal Number")

```

### Column

```{python}
#| title: Animal Species
@render_widget

def plot_animal_species():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "animal_species", "Document Count by Animal Species")

```


## Row

### Column
```{python}
#| title: Animal Strain
@render_widget

def plot_animal_strain():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "animal_strain", "Document Count by Animal Strain")

```

### Column
```{python}
#| title: Animal Sex
@render_widget

def plot_animal_sex():
  filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
  return category_bar_chart(preclinical_df, "animal_sex", "Document Count by Animal Sex")

```


# Clinical

```{python}
#| title: Clinical
@render.data_frame
def datagrid_clinical():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()
    to_show = clinical_df[["nct_id","study_official_title","start_date","phase","study_type","overall_status","disease","drug","Disease Class"
]]
    return render.DataGrid(
        to_show,
        width="100%",
        filters=True,
    )
```

## Row

### Column {height=50%}

```{python}
@render_widget  
def phase_bar_chart():  
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()

    phase_order = [
        'Early Phase 1',
        'Phase 1',
        'Phase 1/2',
        'Phase 2',
        'Phase 2/3',
        'Phase 3',
        'Phase 4',
        'Not Applicable'
    ]
        # Count the occurrences of each phase
    phase_counts = clinical_df['phase'].value_counts().reindex(phase_order, fill_value=0).reset_index()
    phase_counts.columns = ['phase', 'count']
    
    # Create the bar chart with counts displayed on top of the bars
    bar_chart = px.bar(
        phase_counts, 
        x='phase', 
        y='count',
        title="Distribution of Phases",
        template="plotly_white",
        category_orders={'phase': phase_order},
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe,  # Set a more vibrant color scale
        text='count'  # Display counts on top of the bars
    )
    bar_chart.update_traces(textposition='outside', textfont_size=12)

    return bar_chart 
```

### Column {height=50%}


```{python}
@render_widget
def status_bar_chart():
    filtered_df, clinical_df, preclinical_df = filtered_documents()

    # Count the occurrences of each overall status
    status_counts = clinical_df['overall_status'].value_counts().reset_index()
    status_counts.columns = ['overall_status', 'count']
    status_counts = status_counts.sort_values(by='count', ascending=True)

    # Create the bar chart with the correct x and y axes
    bar_chart = px.bar(
        status_counts, 
        x='count', 
        y='overall_status',  # Correctly specify the y-axis as the count
        title="Distribution of Overall Status",
        template="plotly_white",
        text='count',  # Display counts on top of the bars
        color_discrete_sequence=px.colors.qualitative.Safe,
        orientation='h'
    )

    bar_chart.update_traces(textposition='outside', textfont_size=12)
    
    return bar_chart
```
